judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python step applied an incorrect CPC parsing rule (requiring code[4]=='/' and slicing to code[:7]) that filtered out virtually all valid CPC codes from the publicationinfo.cpc field, leading to an empty dataset and returning no codes for 2022 despite data being present.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed EMAs directly on raw CPC codes from publicationinfo and never joined CPCDefinition_database to map and filter to level‑5 group codes, resulting in an incomplete plan that returned [] instead of the required level‑5 CPC group codes whose best year is 2022.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent counts every CPC entry (including duplicates within a single record and non-inventive/tagging codes) and derives groups by taking the first 4 characters, so repeated codes shown in the queried cpc lists (e.g., duplicates like "H01M4/505" in the trace) are double-counted, skewing EMA calculations and yielding the wrong set of 2022 “best year” groups.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (call id function-call-6545383106479605982), the agent computed EMAs over only the observed years per CPC (without filling missing years with zeros) and simply mapped CPCs to level‑5 symbols by prefix from the cpc_definition query (function-call-16156661485933672654), leading to incorrect "best year" determinations and inclusion of non-target categories (e.g., Y02*), so the returned codes do not match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step, the agent filtered CPC symbols by level using a numeric comparison (record.get('level') == 5.0) while the CPCDefinition_database returns 'level' as strings like "9.0" (per the query_db preview), causing the level_5 set to be empty and yielding an empty result instead of the correct 2022-best CPC groups.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
